name: Kali (kali-mcp)
onCreateCommand: apt-get update && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates curl iproute2 python3-pip python3-venv nmap nmap-common network-manager
postCreateCommand: python3 -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install -U pip setuptools wheel && pip install -e .
postStartCommand: echo 'kali-mcp: source .venv/bin/activate && kali-mcp  (port 8765, bound in containerEnv).'
